\\n\\n&lt;size=120%&gt;&lt;b&gt;DIY MUSIC - GETTING STARTED&lt;/b&gt;&lt;/size&gt;\\n\\n1: Connect   \r\n8 &lt;link=ThingDeviceStepUnit&gt;&lt;color=green&gt;Device Step Unit&lt;/color&gt;&lt;/link&gt;s to    \r\nyour step sequencer via the data port on the left hand side.\\n\\n2: Label each   \r\nstep unit, then assign step units 1 through 8 on the step sequencer using the   \r\nscrewdriver.\\n\\n3: Select the output speaker (eg\r\n&lt;link=ThingPassiveSpeaker&gt;&lt;color=green&gt;Passive Speaker&lt;/color&gt;&lt;/link&gt;) where    \r\nthe sequencer will play the sounds. This needs to be connected to the logic     \r\nnetwork on the right hand side of the sequencer.\\n\\n4: Place a\r\n&lt;link=ThingStopWatch&gt;&lt;color=green&gt;Stop Watch&lt;/color&gt;&lt;/link&gt; and use a\r\n&lt;link=ThingStructureLogicReader&gt;&lt;color=green&gt;Logic Reader&lt;/color&gt;&lt;/link&gt; and    \r\n&lt;link=ThingStructureLogicWriter&gt;&lt;color=green&gt;Logic Writer&lt;/color&gt;&lt;/link&gt; to     \r\nwrite the time to the time variable on the sequencer.\\n\\n5: Set the BPM on the  \r\nsequencer using a\r\n&lt;link=ThingStructureLogicDial&gt;&lt;color=green&gt;Dial&lt;/color&gt;&lt;/link&gt; and a\r\n&lt;link=ThingStructureLogicWriter&gt;&lt;color=green&gt;Logic Writer&lt;/color&gt;&lt;/link&gt; to     \r\nwrite to the sequencer's BPM variable. A higher bpm will play the sequence      \r\nfaster. \\n\\n6: Insert a sound cartridge of your choosing and select which       \r\nvariant of sound you wish to play by pushing the arrow buttons located above    \r\nand below the sound cartridge slot.\\n\\n7: Choose the pitch of the sounds to     \r\nplay by setting the dial on each of your 8 step units to the desired note.      \r\nWith drums, each note is a different drum sounds.   "textEditContent": "# Extract device logic information from Stationpedia.json\n$devices = @(\n    \"ThingLandingpad_ThreshholdPiece\", \"ThingLaunchSilo\", \"ThingLogicStepSequencer8\", \n \"ThingModularDeviceGauge3x3\",\n    \"ThingModularDeviceLabelDiode2\", \"ThingModularDeviceLabelDiode3\", \"ThingModularDeviceLEDdisplay2\",\n    \"ThingModularDeviceLEDdisplay3\", \"ThingModularDeviceLight\", \"ThingModularDeviceLightLarge\",\n    \"ThingModularDeviceLightSmall\", \"ThingModularDeviceMeter3x3\", \"ThingModularDeviceNumpad\",\n    \"ThingModularDeviceRoundButton\", \"ThingModularDeviceSlider\", \"ThingModularDeviceSliderDiode1\",\n    \"ThingModularDeviceSliderDiode2\", \"ThingModularDeviceSquareButton\", \"ThingModularDeviceSwitch\",\n    \"ThingModularDeviceThrottle3x2\", \"ThingModularDeviceUtilityButton2x2\", \"ThingMotherboardDebugAnalyzer\",\n    \"ThingPassiveSpeaker\", \"ThingPortableSolarPanel\", \"ThingRobot\", \"ThingRover_MkI\", \"ThingStopWatch\",\n    \"ThingStructureAccessBridge\", \"ThingStructureActiveVent\", \"ThingStructureAdvancedComposter\",\n    \"ThingStructureAdvancedFurnace\", \"ThingStructureAdvancedPackagingMachine\", \"ThingStructureAirConditioner\",\n    \"ThingStructureAirlock\", \"ThingStructureAirlockGate\", \"ThingStructureAirlockWide\",\n    \"ThingStructureAngledBench\", \"ThingStructureArcFurnace\", \"ThingStructureAreaPowerControl\",\n    \"ThingStructureAreaPowerControlReversed\", \"ThingStructureAutolathe\", \"ThingStructureAutomatedOven\",\n    \"ThingStructureAutoMinerSmall\", \"ThingStructureBackLiquidPressureRegulator\", \"ThingStructureBackPressureRegulator\",\n    \"ThingStructureBasketHoop\", \"ThingStructureBattery\", \"ThingStructureBatteryCharger\",\n    \"ThingStructureBatteryChargerSmall\", \"ThingStructureBatteryLarge\"\n)\n\nWrite-Host \"Loading Stationpedia.json...\" -ForegroundColor Cyan\n$json = Get-Content \"Stationeers\\Stationpedia\\Stationpedia.json\" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$results = @()\n\nforeach ($deviceKey in $devices) {\n    Write-Host \"Processing $deviceKey...\" -ForegroundColor Yellow\n    \n    $page = $json.pages | Where-Object { $_.Key -eq $deviceKey } | Select-Object -First 1\n    \n    if ($page) {\n        $logicTypes = @()\n        if ($page.LogicInsert -and $page.LogicInsert.Count -gt 0) {\n            $logicTypes = $page.LogicInsert | ForEach-Object { \n                $_.LogicName -replace '&lt;[^&gt;]+&gt;', ''\n            }\n        }\n        \n        $slots = @()\n        if ($page.Slots -and $page.Slots.Count -gt 0) {\n            $slots = $page.Slots | ForEach-Object { \n                $_.SlotName \n            }\n        }\n        \n        $result = [PSCustomObject]@{\n            deviceKey = $deviceKey\n            displayName = $page.Title -replace '&lt;[^&gt;]+&gt;', ''\n            prefabName = $page.PrefabName\n            hasLogic = ($logicTypes.Count -gt 0)\n            logicTypes = $logicTypes\n            slots = $slots\n        }\n        \n        $results += $result\n    } else {\n        Write-Host \"  NOT FOUND!\" -ForegroundColor Red\n    }\n}\n\n# Export to JSON\n$output = $results | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10\nSet-Content -Path \"device_logic_data.json\" -Value $output\n\nWrite-Host \"&#96;nExported data to device_logic_data.json\" -ForegroundColor Green\nWrite-Host \"Total devices processed: $($results.Count)\" -ForegroundColor Green\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}

Result:

```json
{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/analyze_device_logic.ps1)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/analyze_device_logic.ps1)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# Load device data\n$jsonData = Get-Content \"device_logic_data.json\" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n# Map prefab names to likely source file patterns\n$classNameMap = @{\n    \"Landingpad_ThreshholdPiece\" = \"LandingPadTaxiThreshold\"\n    \"LaunchSilo\" = \"LaunchSilo\"\n    \"LogicStepSequencer8\" = \"LogicStepSequencer\"\n    \"ModularDeviceAlarm\" = \"ModularDeviceAlarm\"\n    \"ModularDeviceBigLever\" = \"ModularDeviceBigLever\"\n    \"ModularDeviceCardReader\" = \"ModularDeviceCardReader\"\n    \"ModularDeviceComputer\" = \"Computer\"\n    \"ModularDeviceConsole\" = \"Console\"\n    \"ModularDeviceDial\" = \"ModularDeviceDial\"\n    \"ModularDeviceDialSmall\" = \"ModularDeviceDialSmall\"\n    \"ModularDeviceEmergencyButton3x3\" = \"ModularDeviceEmergencyButton\"\n    \"ModularDeviceFlipCoverSwitch\" = \"ModularDeviceFlipCoverSwitch\"\n    \"ModularDeviceFlipSwitch\" = \"ModularDeviceFlipSwitch\"\n    \"PassiveSpeaker\" = \"PassiveSpeaker\"\n    \"PortableSolarPanel\" = \"PortableSolarPanel\"\n    \"Robot\" = \"Robot\"\n    \"Rover_MkI\" = \"Rover\"\n    \"StopWatch\" = \"StopWatch\"\n    \"StructureAccessBridge\" = \"AccessBridge\"\n    \"StructureActiveVent\" = \"ActiveVent\"\n    \"StructureAdvancedComposter\" = \"AdvancedComposter\"\n    \"StructureAdvancedFurnace\" = \"AdvancedFurnace\"\n    \"StructureAdvancedPackagingMachine\" = \"AdvancedPackagingMachine\"\n    \"StructureAirConditioner\" = \"AirConditioner\"\n    \"StructureAirlock\" = \"Airlock\"\n    \"StructureAirlockGate\" = \"AirlockGate\"\n    \"StructureAirlockWide\" = \"AirlockWide\"\n    \"StructureAngledBench\" = \"AngledBench\"\n    \"StructureArcFurnace\" = \"ArcFurnace\"\n    \"StructureAreaPowerControl\" = \"AreaPowerControl\"\n    \"StructureAutolathe\" = \"Autolathe\"\n    \"StructureAutomatedOven\" = \"AutomatedOven\"\n    \"StructureAutoMinerSmall\" = \"AutoMiner\"\n    \"StructureBackLiquidPressureRegulator\" = \"BackLiquidPressureRegulator\"\n    \"StructureBackPressureRegulator\" = \"BackPressureRegulator\"\n    \"StructureBasketHoop\" = \"BasketHoop\"\n    \"StructureBattery\" = \"Battery\"\n    \"StructureBatteryCharger\" = \"BatteryCharger\"\n    \"StructureBatteryChargerSmall\" = \"BatteryChargerSmall\"\n    \"StructureBatteryLarge\" = \"BatteryLarge\"\n}\n\nWrite-Host \"Analyzing devices and searching for source files...\" -ForegroundColor Cyan\n\n$results = @()\n\nforeach ($device in $jsonData) {\n    Write-Host \"Processing: $($device.displayName)\" -ForegroundColor Yellow\n    \n    $className = $classNameMap[$device.prefabName]\n    if (-not $className) {\n        $className = $device.prefabName\n    }\n    \n    # Search for the class file\n    $sourceFile = \"\"\n    $searchResults = Get-ChildItem -Path \"Assembly-CSharp\" -Recurse -Filter \"*.cs\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | \n        Select-String -Pattern \"^\\s*public class $className\\b\" -List\n    \n    if ($searchResults) {\n        $sourceFile = ($searchResults | Select-Object -First 1).Path -replace [regex]::Escape($PWD.Path + \"\\\"), \"\"\n    }\n    \n    # Build findings summary\n    $findings = @()\n    \n    # Analyze logic types\n    $logicTypesList = $device.logicTypes\n    if ($logicTypesList -is [array]) {\n        foreach ($logicType in $logicTypesList) {\n            switch ($logicType) {\n                \"Power\" { $findings += \"Power: Current power draw\" }\n                \"On\" { $findings += \"On: Device power state (read/write)\" }\n                \"Open\" { $findings += \"Open: Door/cover open state\" }\n                \"Lock\" { $findings += \"Lock: Lock state for doors\" }\n                \"Mode\" { $findings += \"Mode: Operating mode\" }\n                \"Setting\" { $findings += \"Setting: Current setting value\" }\n                \"Activate\" { $findings += \"Activate: Trigger button press\" }\n                \"Error\" { $findings += \"Error: Error code state\" }\n                \"Ratio\" { $findings += \"Ratio: Current percentage/ratio\" }\n                \"Maximum\" { $findings += \"Maximum: Maximum value setting\" }\n                \"Charge\" { $findings += \"Charge: Battery charge level\" }\n                \"Color\" { $findings += \"Color: RGB color value\" }\n                \"Temperature\" { $findings += \"Temperature: Temperature reading\" }\n                \"Pressure\" { $findings += \"Pressure: Pressure reading\" }\n                \"Quantity\" { $findings += \"Quantity: Item quantity\" }\n                \"RequiredPower\" { $findings += \"RequiredPower: Power requirement\" }\n                \"Idle\" { $findings += \"Idle: Device idle state\" }\n                \"RecipeHash\" { $findings += \"RecipeHash: Current recipe hash\" }\n                \"CompletionRatio\" { $findings += \"CompletionRatio: Production progress\" }\n                \"ExportCount\" { $findings += \"ExportCount: Export slot occupancy\" }\n                \"ImportCount\" { $findings += \"ImportCount: Import slot occupancy\" }\n                \"Reagents\" { $findings += \"Reagents: Reagent mix level\" }\n                \"Time\" { $findings += \"Time: Time value\" }\n                \"Bpm\" { $findings += \"Bpm: Beats per minute\" }\n                \"Volume\" { $findings += \"Volume: Audio volume\" }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    $result = [PSCustomObject]@{\n        deviceKey = $device.deviceKey\n        displayName = $device.displayName\n        prefabName = $device.prefabName\n        hasLogic = $device.hasLogic\n        logicTypes = $logicTypesList\n        sourceFile = $sourceFile\n        findings = ($findings -join \"; \")\n        slots = $device.slots\n    }\n    \n    $results += $result\n}\n\n# Export results\n$output = $results | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10\nSet-Content -Path \"device_analysis_complete.json\" -Value $output\n\nWrite-Host \"&#96;nAnalysis complete! Results saved to device_analysis_complete.json\" -ForegroundColor Green\nWrite-Host \"Total devices analyzed: $($results.Count)\" -ForegroundColor Green\nWrite-Host \"Devices with source files found: $(($results | Where-Object { $_.sourceFile }).Count)\" -ForegroundColor Green\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

{
  "invocationMessage": "Creating [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/build_review_batch6.ps1)",
  "pastTenseMessage": "Created [](file:///c%3A/Dev/12-17-25%20Stationeers%20Respawn%20Update%20Code/build_review_batch6.ps1)",
  "isConfirmed": {
    "type": 1
  },
  "content": "",
  "textEditContent": "# Build complete device entries for review-batch-6\n\n$standardDescs = @{\n    'Power' = 'Returns 1 if device is powered.'\n    'On' = 'Device on/off state.'\n    'RequiredPower' = 'Power draw in watts.'\n    'Temperature' = 'Temperature in Kelvin.'\n    'TemperatureInput' = 'Temperature at input in Kelvin.'\n    'TemperatureOutput' = 'Temperature at output in Kelvin.'\n    'TemperatureOutput2' = 'Temperature at second output in Kelvin.'\n    'Pressure' = 'Pressure in kPa.'\n    'PressureInput' = 'Pressure at input in kPa.'\n    'PressureOutput' = 'Pressure at output in kPa.'\n    'PressureOutput2' = 'Pressure at second output in kPa.'\n    'Open' = 'Whether device is open.'\n    'ReferenceId' = 'Unique reference ID.'\n    'PrefabHash' = 'Device type hash.'\n    'NameHash' = 'Custom name hash.'\n    'TotalMoles' = 'Total gas moles in device.'\n    'TotalMolesInput' = 'Total gas moles at input.'\n    'TotalMolesOutput' = 'Total gas moles at output.'\n    'TotalMolesOutput2' = 'Total gas moles at second output.'\n    'Combustion' = 'Whether combustion is occurring.'\n    'CombustionInput' = 'Whether combustion is occurring at input.'\n    'CombustionOutput' = 'Whether combustion is occurring at output.'\n    'CombustionOutput2' = 'Whether combustion is occurring at second output.'\n    'Maximum' = 'Maximum capacity or value.'\n    'Quantity' = 'Quantity of stored material.'\n    'Charge' = 'Current charge level.'\n    'Horizontal' = 'Horizontal angle setting.'\n    'Vertical' = 'Vertical angle setting.'\n    'Ratio' = 'Fill ratio or progress ratio.'\n    'Lock' = 'Device lock state.'\n    'Activate' = 'Trigger activation.'\n    'Idle' = 'Whether device is idle.'\n    'ClearMemory' = 'Write 1 to clear memory.'\n    'RecipeHash' = 'Currently selected recipe hash.'\n    'ImportCount' = 'Count of items in import slot.'\n    'ExportCount' = 'Count of items in export slot.'\n    'StackSize' = 'Stack size in current slot.'\n    'Reagents' = 'Number of reagents in current recipe.'\n    'CompletionRatio' = 'Manufacturing completion ratio (0-1).'\n    'Color' = 'Display color setting.'\n    'Volume' = 'Audio volume level.'\n    'SoundAlert' = 'Sound alert mode.'\n}\n\n# Add gas ratios\n$gasTypes = @('Oxygen','Nitrogen','CarbonDioxide','Volatiles','Water','Pollutant','NitrousOxide','Hydrogen','Steam','PollutedWater','LiquidOxygen','LiquidNitrogen','LiquidCarbonDioxide','LiquidVolatiles','LiquidPollutant','LiquidNitrousOxide','LiquidHydrogen')\nforeach ($gas in $gasTypes) {\n    $key = \"Ratio$gas\"\n    $standardDescs[$key] = \"$gas ratio in internal atmosphere.\"\n    $standardDescs[\"${key}Input\"] = \"$gas ratio at input.\"\n    $standardDescs[\"${key}Output\"] = \"$gas ratio at output.\"\n    $standardDescs[\"${key}Output2\"] = \"$gas ratio at second output.\"\n}\n\n# Device-specific descriptions\n$deviceSpecific = @{\n    'ThingStructureFiltration' = @{\n        'Mode' = 'Filtration mode: 0=Waste, 1=Filtration.'\n        'Setting' = 'Target gas type to filter.'\n        'Error' = 'Error state: 1 if filtration system has error.'\n    }\n    'ThingStructureFridgeSmall' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Target temperature setting in Kelvin.'\n    }\n    'ThingStructureAutomatedOven' = @{\n        'Error' = 'Error state: 1 if recipe incomplete or slot issues.'\n    }\n    'ThingStructureArcFurnace' = @{\n        'Error' = 'Error state: 1 if smelting issue or insufficient resources.'\n    }\n    'ThingStructureLiquidTankStorage' = @{}\n    'ThingStructureTransformerSmallReversed' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Power transformation ratio setting.'\n        'Error' = 'Error state: 1 if power issues.'\n    }\n    'ThingStructureConsole' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Current console display mode.'\n        'Error' = 'Error state: 1 if console has error.'\n    }\n    'ThingStructureSuitStorageLocker' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Pressure/temperature target setting.'\n        'Error' = 'Error state: 1 if environmental control fails.'\n    }\n    'ThingStructureSolarPanelFlat' = @{}\n    'ThingStructureLogicReagentReader' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Selected reagent type to read.'\n        'Error' = 'Error state: 1 if no valid target.'\n    }\n    'ThingModularDeviceLabelDiode3' = @{\n        'Mode' = 'Display mode setting.'\n    }\n    'ThingStructureGrowLight' = @{}\n    'ThingStructureLogicButton' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Button press state (read-only).'\n    }\n    'ThingStructurePassthroughHeatExchangerGasToLiquid' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Heat exchange target setting.'\n    }\n    'ThingModularDeviceGauge2x2' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Gauge display value.'\n    }\n    'ThingModularDeviceFlipSwitch' = @{\n        'Setting' = 'Switch position (read-only).'\n    }\n    'ThingPortableSolarPanel' = @{}\n}\n\nfunction Get-DataType {\n    param($logicType, $access)\n    \n    if ($logicType -match '^Ratio' -or $logicType -in @('Ratio','Temperature','Pressure','Power','RequiredPower','Maximum','Charge','Horizontal','Vertical','CompletionRatio','Volume')) {\n        return 'Float'\n    }\n    elseif ($logicType -in @('On','Open','Combustion','Power','Lock','Activate','Error','Idle','CombustionInput','CombustionOutput','CombustionOutput2')) {\n        return 'Boolean'\n    }\n    elseif ($logicType -in @('Mode','Setting','ClearMemory','ImportCount','ExportCount','StackSize','Reagents','Color','SoundAlert','Quantity')) {\n        return 'Integer'\n    }\n    elseif ($logicType -in @('ReferenceId','PrefabHash','NameHash','RecipeHash')) {\n        return 'Hash'\n    }\n    else {\n        return 'Float'\n    }\n}\n\nfunction Get-Range {\n    param($logicType, $dataType)\n    \n    switch -Regex ($logicType) {\n        '^(On|Open|Power|Combustion.*|Lock|Activate|Error|Idle)$' { return '0-1' }\n        '^Ratio' { return '0-1' }\n        '^Temperature' { return '0+ K' }\n        '^Pressure' { return '0+ kPa' }\n        'RequiredPower' { return '0+ W' }\n        '(ReferenceId|PrefabHash|NameHash|RecipeHash)' { return 'Hash' }\n        'CompletionRatio' { return '0-1' }\n        'Horizontal|Vertical' { return '-180 to 180' }\n        default { return '0+' }\n    }\n}\n\n# Load review data\n$reviewData = Get-Content 'review6_logic_data.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$output = @()\n\nforeach ($device in $reviewData) {\n    $deviceKey = $device.device\n    $deviceTitle = $device.title\n    \n    Write-Host \"Processing $deviceTitle ($deviceKey)...\" -ForegroundColor Cyan\n    \n    $logicDescs = @()\n    \n    foreach ($logicType in ($device.logics.PSObject.Properties.Name | Sort-Object)) {\n        $access = $device.logics.$logicType.access\n        \n        # Get description\n        if ($deviceSpecific[$deviceKey] -and $deviceSpecific[$deviceKey][$logicType]) {\n            $desc = $deviceSpecific[$deviceKey][$logicType]\n        }\n        elseif ($standardDescs[$logicType]) {\n            $desc = $standardDescs[$logicType]\n        }\n        else {\n            $desc = \"$logicType value.\"\n        }\n        \n        $logicDescs += @{\n            logicType = $logicType\n            dataType = Get-DataType $logicType $access\n            range = Get-Range $logicType (Get-DataType $logicType $access)\n            description = $desc\n            access = $access\n        }\n    }\n    \n    # Build slot descriptions if any\n    $slotDescs = @()\n    if ($device.slots) {\n        foreach ($slot in $device.slots) {\n            if ($slot.name -and $slot.name -ne 'None') {\n                $slotDescs += @{\n                    slotName = $slot.name\n                    slotType = if ($slot.type) { $slot.type } else { 'Any' }\n                    description = \"Slot for $($slot.name).\"\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    $entry = @{\n        deviceKey = $deviceKey\n        displayName = $deviceTitle\n        logicDescriptions = $logicDescs\n        slotDescriptions = $slotDescs\n    }\n    \n    $output += $entry\n}\n\n# Save output\n$outputPath = 'C:\\Dev\\12-17-25 Stationeers Respawn Update Code\\StationpediaPlus\\coordination\\outputs\\review-batch-6-complete.json'\n$output | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Out-File $outputPath -Encoding UTF8\n\nWrite-Host \"&#96;n✓ Generated $($output.Count) complete device entries\" -ForegroundColor Green\nWrite-Host \"✓ Output saved to review-batch-6-complete.json\" -ForegroundColor Green\nWrite-Host \"&#96;nSummary:\" -ForegroundColor Yellow\nforeach ($entry in $output) {\n    Write-Host \"  $($entry.displayName): $($entry.logicDescriptions.Count) logic types\" -ForegroundColor White\n}\n",
  "toolCallResult": null
}
